response:

{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT o.order_id, o.order_total, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) as total_payments, o.order_total - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) as difference FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id, o.order_total HAVING o.order_total != COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) ORDER BY ABS(o.order_total - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0)) DESC;",
  "reason": "Query identifies orders where payment amounts don't match order totals"
}
